extraction_reasoning: No litigation summary table is provided, so there are no against-vs-by rows to count; criminal, statutory/regulatory, and tax proceedings are therefore all not disclosed. The risk section mentions a contingent liability as of March 31, 2009 arising from an income-tax notice, but provides no amount or stated Total, so no contingent-liabilities figure can be extracted. No company-wide customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the section gives no fiscal period or denominator based on revenue from operations or total income. The only explicit monetary table uses Rs. million, so the source unit is million; no litigation or contingent-liability amount is available for conversion to crore (1 million = 0.1 crore).
